name: Export view exposes the judge-readable LOOP.md artifact
description: When a builder opens the export view, the generated markdown should present the submission context, readiness checklist, agent loop timeline, and evidence ledger for judges.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the LoopLedger live app
Verify the export view heading says Export LOOP.md
Verify the export preview includes Submission Context, Submission Readiness, Agent Loop Timeline, and Evidence Ledger sections
Verify Copy and Download actions are available in the export view
